case_title: WILLIAM DORSEY VS. SARAH MICHELLE ZISMAN et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORSEY, WILLIAM

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-16-2010 CONTINUED TO APR-12-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH MAR-14-2011. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON NOV-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
